reviews.comment:
Pésima la infraestructura para ser ACÁ. La cafetería insulsa y la panificacion mala. NI HABLAR DE LOS BAÑOS, aparte de sucios, el olor parecía la jaula de los leones de un zoológico. Ni jabón para las manos. Un espanto

(Translated by Google)
The infrastructure is terrible for this location. The cafeteria is bland and the bread is bad. And don't even get me started on the bathrooms—besides being filthy, they smelled like a lion's cage in a zoo. There wasn't even any hand soap. A disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13560852497782036478/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURqcko3dHRnRRAB

Very poor service. Especially from the people serving the public...not at the beach, but at the restaurant.

reviewReply.comment: Buenas tardes, solicitamos su respuesta sobre que servicio no fue ofrecido.. Desde ya aclaramos que no realizamos tramites migratorios...
